name: Qingdao Richen Foods Co., Ltd.
summary: Qingdao Richen Foods Co., Ltd. engages in the development, production, and sale of compound seasonings and product solutions to the food industry in China. It offers vermicelli, sauces, soups, and spices for Chinese cooking, as well as coating flour and paste, and prepared foods. The company's products are used in various types of barbecue, fried food, and prepared food production. It provides services to the food market, as well as a range of product solutions for various supermarkets and restaurant chain enterprises under the Flavor Story brand; and export food processing enterprises of livestock and poultry products, aquatic products, vegetable products, etc. The company exports its products primarily to Asia, Europe, and the United States. Qingdao Richen Foods Co., Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is based in Qingdao, China.
